title: TT-Core Service Catalog
description: Schema for tt-core/config/service-catalog.json — the canonical service metadata authority.

updated.description: Date this catalog was last updated (YYYY-MM-DD)

profile.description: Docker Compose profile name (null for core services)

additional_profiles.description: Extra profiles required alongside primary profile

tier.description: local_only: never exposed; restricted_admin: admin surface, requires explicit ack; public_app: safe for tunnel

public_capable.description: Can this service be exposed via Cloudflare Tunnel?

auto_start_tunnel.description: Default tunnel route state (true = enabled by default)

route_name.description: Route key used in services.select.json tunnel.routes

requires_explicit_ack.description: If true, security.allow_restricted_admin_tunnel_routes must be true to expose via tunnel

tunnel.description: Tunnel configuration metadata (only for public_capable services)

toggle.description: Env var that enables this route (legacy compat)

subdomain_var.description: Env var for subdomain override (legacy compat)

health.description: Health probe configuration for smoke tests

probe_required.description: If false, probe failure is non-blocking in smoke tests

probe_skip_unless_env.description: Skip probe unless this env var/value is set
